title: Tapping for spotting profitable ideas
subtitle: A tapping practice for when good money ideas are passing you by unnoticed.
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 43 of the MONEY program. The script works with the habit of second-guessing money instincts before they can take root.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 43 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when a potentially good idea has come and gone before you acted on it, or when you consistently doubt your creative instincts around money.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 43 of the MONEY program. The script works with the habit of second-guessing money instincts — the flash of an idea dismissed before it's examined, the creative signal overridden by doubt.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I sometimes miss good money ideas, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I doubt my ability to spot opportunities, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I've second-guessed my instincts, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round (repeat x3)
**Eyebrow:** I've overlooked chances that could pay well.
**Side of eye:** I've told myself it wasn't the right time.
**Under eye:** I've hesitated until the moment passed.
**Under nose:** I doubted my creative flashes.
**Chin:** I thought big ideas were for someone else.
**Collarbone:** I want to see clearly when money doors open.
**Under arm:** I'm ready to notice profitable ideas.
**Top of head:** I trust my eyes and intuition to spot them.
Reframe to positive (repeat x3)
**Eyebrow:** Great money ideas show up for me every day.
**Side of eye:** I notice them easily and quickly.
**Under eye:** I trust my inner yes when something feels right.
**Under nose:** I welcome insights that lead to wealth.
**Chin:** I love how creative and sharp I feel.
**Collarbone:** I act on good ideas with calm confidence.
**Under arm:** I expect opportunities to keep arriving.
**Top of head:** I see and seize profitable ideas with ease.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from
Adapted from Day 43 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). EFT tapping developed by Gary Craig in the 1990s, based on Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy.
